rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual editorial that synthesizes broad prior literature rather than testing a specific model, and the only pair-specific evidence is a single DOI match with no in-text citation context. The cited paper is a well-known mechanism paper on online content sharing (emotion/arousal and virality), which could plausibly be used as foundational background in a multimedia/text discussion, but current evidence does not show whether it is central or just an example. Because the evidence is sparse and mixed, this pair is not safe to drop.
